query: hey can you check my n8n instance and tell me which workflows failed in the last 24 hours? i think the slack notification one is broken again
i need to create a new automation that watches a google sheet for changes and sends an email via sendgrid whenever a new row is added. can you build this in n8n for me?
export all workflows from my n8n cloud instance to a backup json file, i want to version control them in git
show me all the projects in my n8n setup and which workflows belong to each one, i'm trying to reorganize things
my automation pipeline keeps timing out on the http request step. the workflow id is V0BnxXtaIcWVaxJc, can you pull the execution logs and figure out what's going wrong?
i want to deactivate all workflows tagged 'staging' on my n8n instance, there's like 12 of them and i don't want to do it manually
can you set up a cron schedule on n8n that runs every monday at 8am and hits our internal health check endpoint then posts to our team channel on slack?
we need to add a new api credential in n8n for our stripe integration, the type is httpHeaderAuth. can you create it via the api?
list all the variables configured in my n8n instance, i think someone changed the API_ENDPOINT variable and it broke production
i need to transfer the 'Daily Report' workflow from the 'Clients' project to 'ZapSense' project in n8n
build me a github actions workflow that runs tests on every PR and deploys to vercel on merge to main
can you help me set up a zapier automation that connects my gmail to notion? i want new emails to create database entries
i need to write a python script that processes csv files and uploads them to s3, can you help?
set up a nextjs api route that accepts webhook payloads from stripe and updates our database
help me configure apache airflow DAGs for our data pipeline, we need to orchestrate spark jobs
can you create a make.com scenario that triggers when a new lead comes in from hubspot and adds it to our airtable?
write a terraform module that provisions an ECS cluster with auto-scaling and load balancing
i'm trying to set up temporal.io workflows for our order processing system, can you help with the workflow definition?
my kubernetes cronjob keeps failing with OOMKilled, can you help me debug the resource limits?
can you help me build a power automate flow that sends teams notifications when sharepoint files are updated?
